evidence_label: branch-review clinician brief refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia OR transfusion dependent thalassemia) AND (exagamglogene OR gene therapy OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR allogeneic OR iron overload OR transfusion burden OR cost-effectiveness) AND (2025:2026[dp])

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct
guideline_sources.role: supports asking a hematologist to separate allogeneic HCT discussion from other branches and to check donor, iron, organ, and follow-up context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: supports asking a hematologist to separate autologous gene-cell therapy from HCT and to check transfusion, iron, organ, fertility, collection, and access context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_transfusion
guideline_sources.role: supports bringing transfusion burden and response records before interpreting branch suitability

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_iron_overload
guideline_sources.role: supports bringing ferritin, liver iron, cardiac T2*, chelator, and organ-risk context before branch interpretation

pubmed_records.title: Exa-cel in children with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia or sickle cell disease.
pubmed_records.source: The New England Journal of Medicine

pubmed_records.title: Correction of ineffective erythropoiesis and normalization of iron homeostasis after exagamglogene autotemcel in transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Cost-effectiveness of exagamglogene autotemcel gene-edited therapy in patients with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia in the United States.
Current therapeutic landscape of beta-thalassemia: focus on gene therapy.
Experience with stem cell collection for children with transfusion-dependent thalassemia undergoing gene therapy.
pubmed_records.source: Zhonghua Yi Xue Yi Chuan Xue Za Zhi

pubmed_records.title: Second allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation after graft failure is an effective curative option in children with hemoglobinopathies.
Assessment of hepatic fibrosis in Egyptian children and adolescents with beta thalassemia major: a single center study.
Best practices in gene therapy for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.

decision_use: These sources support a narrow clinician brief: verify six packet domains, then ask one private branch-scope question, then capture only public-safe labels. They do not support public diagnosis, eligibility, therapy selection, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion changes, chelation changes, lab contact, private-message routing, or sample routing.
